title: Valley fever (coccidioidomycosis) - Canada.ca
content:
## Valley fever (coccidioidomycosis)
Learn about valley fever, its causes, symptoms, risks, treatment and prevention. Also find information on surveillance and for health professionals.

## Services and information
Explore the cause of valley fever, how it is spread and where it is found.
Learn about the symptoms of valley fever, what to look for and what to do if you become ill.
Find out what the risks are and who is most at risk.
Access information on how valley fever is diagnosed and how it is treated.
Learn how valley fever can be prevented.
Learn about valley fever surveillance.

### Information for health professionals
Get detailed information for health professionals.
- Public Health Agency of Canada
